title: 1981-04-16_Pat_13.txt
key_claims: Because Dick remembered the cancelled, lethal "zero phase" timeline, the alternate personality ("Thomas") who lived in that timeline was brought over and integrated into Dick's mind. Thomas and Phil are now one.
Dick conceptualizes his writing of *Tears* and *VALIS* as an epic mythic victory: he acted as Siegfried, aided by Wotan and Dionysos, to defeat Fate (the Norns / the Black Iron Prison).
He claims to have stolen the "third eye" (ajna) from the blind creator-god Yaldabaoth to read the Book of Fate (the hidden source code of reality).
By revealing this secret in his published novel *VALIS*, Dick broke the power of the Black Iron Prison and liberated humanity, forcing Fate to rewrite its ledger.
*Tears of a Drop* was actually the Book of Fate itself—the raw, deterministic coding of reality—which Dick deciphered and decoded in *VALIS*.
recurring_concepts: **The Secret Stolen**: The knowledge that Christ is present (*VALIS*) and that causality is an illusion, stolen from the angelic powers and distributed via mass-market sci-fi.
**The Ajna Eye**: The third eye of spiritual vision required to see past the occlusion of the BIP.
reading_excerpt: Because Dick remembered the cancelled, lethal "zero phase" timeline, the alternate personality ("Thomas") who lived in that timeline was brought over and integrated into Dick's mind. Thomas and Phil are now one.
